name: Basic
author: MOTH
description:
The Basic brush paints a consistent, uniform color across the canvas.

The effect is controlled by several parameters:
 🔹 Radius → determines the size of the brush
 🔹 Color → sets the base color of the brush
 🔹 Alpha → controls the opacity of the brush strokes
 🔹 Blur Edges → ON = smooth, feathered edges; OFF = hard edges

Usage:
 🔸 Click and drag on the canvas to paint with the selected color.
usage_instructions: Click and drag on the canvas to paint with the selected color.
